title: stelis orecta
intro: Stelis orecta, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, Stelis orecta has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which are said to include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Stelis orecta is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
